sellers_note: This 2021 BMW X5 xDrive40i represents a sophisticated choice for drivers seeking a luxury SUV that balances performance with everyday practicality. - Apple CarPlay and Android Auto Compatibility - Connected Package Pro with WiFi Hotspot - Navigation System with Live Cockpit Pro - Parking Assistance Package with Surround View and 3D View - Power moonroof - Remote Engine Start - Front and rear heated seats with heated steering wheel - 20 V-Spoke alloy wheels with run-flat tires - 3.0L twin-turbo I6 engine with 8-speed automatic sport transmission and AWD - Hi-Fi sound system with SiriusXM 360L satellite radio - 4-zone automatic climate control - Active Park Distance Control with parking assistant - Premium sport seats with lumbar support and memory settings The 3.0L twin-turbo I6 engine paired with an 8-speed automatic sport transmission and all-wheel drive delivers capable performance while achieving 21 city and 25 highway fuel economy. The exterior showcases Phytonic Blue Metallic paint with 20 V-spoke alloy wheels and run-flat tires, presenting a refined stance on the road. Inside, the cabin prioritizes both comfort and technology. Premium sport seats feature heated front seats with armrests and a heated steering wheel, complemented by four-zone automatic climate control. Power-adjustable front seats with memory settings ensure every driver finds their ideal position. The SensaTec upholstery combines durability with luxury aesthetics. Technology integration centers on the Live Cockpit Pro with navigation, offering intuitive control of vehicle functions. Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility keep your smartphone seamlessly connected. The Connected Package Pro includes a three-month or 3GB WiFi hotspot trial and wireless charging. SiriusXM 360L satellite radio with 10 speakers and a hi-fi sound system delivers quality audio entertainment throughout your drive. Safety and convenience features work together to enhance your driving experience. The Parking Assistance Package includes active park distance control, surround view with 3D view, drive recorder, and parking assistant plus. Additional safety technology comprises dual front and side airbags, knee airbags, overhead airbags, electronic stability control, traction control, and BMW Assist eCall emergency communication. This X5 xDrive40i has been fully inspected and is ready for a test drive. We invite you to experience how this vehicle's combination of luxury, technology, and capability can meet your driving needs.
